titleEn: China moves to contain new SAT-1 foot-and-mouth outbreak
titleZh: 中国应对新型SAT-1口蹄疫疫情：边境管控、扑杀与紧急疫苗获批
summaryZh: 中国西北地区（甘肃、新疆）爆发SAT-1型口蹄疫，这是该血清型首次在中国出现，源于非洲并通过西北边境传入。疫情已导致6229头牛受影响，当局启动扑杀、消毒、边境巡逻等措施。由于现有疫苗对SAT-1无效，两款紧急疫苗已获批，预计一个月内上市。分析指出疫情传播快、幼畜死亡率超50%，且可能影响中俄畜产品贸易。
featuredReason: 该新闻涉及新型口蹄疫血清型SAT-1的跨境传入与应急响应，对智慧畜牧行业而言，疫情监测、快速诊断、疫苗研发与冷链物流、以及边境生物安全管控等环节均与IoT/AI技术应用高度相关，值得关注。
contentFull: Health & Disease Notfiable Diseases Foot-and-mouth Disease China moves to contain new SAT-1 foot-and-mouth outbreak Culling, border controls, vaccines ramped up after rare strain detected 6 April 2026 2 minute read By: Global Ag Media Asia China has tightened border controls, fast-tracked vaccines and begun culling cattle after a small outbreak of foot-and-mouth disease in the northwest that officials say entered from abroad, reported Reuters. The Ministry of Agriculture said last weekend it had started culling animals and disinfecting affected areas after outbreaks hit herds totalling 6,229 cattle in Gansu province and the Xinjiang Uyghur Autonomous Region.Industry analysts said it was the first time the SAT-1 serotype—a type of the disease endemic in Africa—had been detected in China, and that existing domestic vaccines for the more common O and A serotypes do not provide protection.Since 2025 SAT-1 has spread from Africa to parts of the Middle East, West Asia and South Asia.Authorities said on Monday the outbreak entered China via the northwest border, a region that touches Kazakhstan, Mongolia, Russia and other countries.Border provinces including Xinjiang and Gansu were ordered to step up patrols and prevent the disease entering through smuggling or illegal transport, according to official notices."The current outbreak threatens a large region and prevention and control are under severe pressure," said Rosa Wang, analyst from Shanghai JC Intelligence Co.Cross-border disease concernsThe outbreak comes as Russia battles a severe cattle disease outbreak in the Siberian Novosibirsk region, which borders Kazakhstan and is about 1200 km (750 miles) and 2500 km, respectively from the outbreak sites in Xinjiang and Gansu.In a report published on March 20, the US Department of Agriculture said the scale of China's response may indicate an unconfirmed outbreak of foot-and-mouth disease. Russia has denied any such outbreak.Animal diseases have previously crossed into China from Russia, including African swine fever in 2018 and foot-and mouth serotype O in 2000 and 2014."It is not out of the question that China could adopt restrictions on Russian livestock products if it has reason to believe the transmission originated there," said Even Pay, director at Trivium China. "But it's more challenging if such outbreaks aren't reported."Spreads quickly, new vaccinesChina said this week the strain spreads easily, can cause major production losses and has a mortality rate exceeding 50% in young animals.SAT-1 spreads mainly through direct contact, but can also be transmitted by air, with airborne spread stronger than that of the more common A and O serotypes, analysts said.Two vaccines targeting SAT-1 produced by Zhongnong Weite Biotechnology Co., Ltd received emergency veterinary drug approvals on Wednesday, according to China’s National Veterinary Drug database. Industry observers said the shots could reach the market within a month.China's livestock sector has been grappling with falling meat prices, overcapacity and weak consumer demand."If it is not controlled well, cattle prices could drop first and then rise again later as herd numbers fall," said Xu HongZhi, analyst at Beijing Orient Agribusiness Consultants. translationZh:
中国已加强边境管控、加速疫苗审批并开始扑杀牛只，以应对西北地区爆发的一起小规模口蹄疫疫情。据路透社报道，官方称该疫情系从境外传入。

中国农业农村部上周末表示，在甘肃省和新疆维吾尔自治区共6229头牛感染后，已开始扑杀动物并对受影响区域进行消毒。

行业分析师指出，这是SAT-1血清型——一种在非洲流行的口蹄疫类型——首次在中国被检测到，而国内现有的针对更常见的O型和A型口蹄疫的疫苗无法提供保护。

自2025年以来，SAT-1已从非洲扩散至中东、西亚和南亚部分地区。

当局周一表示，疫情通过西北边境传入中国，该地区与哈萨克斯坦、蒙古、俄罗斯等国接壤。

根据官方通知，包括新疆和甘肃在内的边境省份已接到命令，要求加强巡逻，防止疫情通过走私或非法运输传入。

“当前疫情威胁范围大，防控压力严峻，”上海JCI公司的分析师Rosa Wang表示。

**跨境疾病担忧**

此次疫情爆发之际，俄罗斯西伯利亚新西伯利亚地区正面临一场严重的牛病疫情，该地区与哈萨克斯坦接壤，距离新疆和甘肃的疫区分别约1200公里和2500公里。

在美国农业部3月20日发布的一份报告中，称中国应对的规模可能表明存在未确认的口蹄疫疫情。俄罗斯已否认有任何此类疫情。

动物疾病此前曾从俄罗斯传入中国，包括2018年的非洲猪瘟以及2000年和2014年的O型口蹄疫。

“如果中国有理由相信疫情源自俄罗斯，不排除会对俄罗斯畜产品实施限制，”Trivium China的董事Even Pay表示。“但如果此类疫情未被报告，处理起来就更加棘手。”

**传播迅速，新疫苗问世**

中国本周表示，该毒株易于传播，可导致重大生产损失，幼畜死亡率超过50%。

分析师称，SAT-1主要通过直接接触传播，但也可通过空气传播，其空气传播能力比更常见的A型和O型更强。

根据中国国家兽药数据库信息，中农威特生物科技股份有限公司生产的两款针对SAT-1的疫苗已于周三获得紧急兽药批准。行业观察人士表示，这些疫苗可能在一个月内上市。

中国畜牧业部门已
contentHtml:
China moves to contain new SAT-1 foot-and-mouth outbreak 
Culling, border controls, vaccines ramped up after rare strain detected
